Our kids and toddlers in ananthnagar aren't able to feel the gentle  crisp sunlight on a weekday evening, or the breeze of the soft playground grass on a weekend. All we get, after paying lakhs of rupees in tax - is dust down their throats and empty flat parking lots to play with. 

We the people of ananthanagar should rise up to the falling pulse of our children! and demand a park in ananthnagar! Come together! and lets get us a park.
